name: TotemGrabber
description:
§l§bTotemGrabber §e§f– Quick and easy offhand management.

When your offhand has no totem, opening your inventory auto-focuses a Totem of Undying for instant swapping. If none is found, it falls back to a shield. You can also use **Shift + Left Click** on totem to send a totem directly to your offhand.


**Commands:**

* /totemgrabber on – Enable mod
* /totemgrabber off – Disable mod
* /totemgrabber toggle – Toggle on/off
* /totemgrabber status – Show ON/OFF + current delay
* /totemgrabber delay <ms> – Set delay (50–2000ms, default 50ms)

✔ Auto totem focus
✔ Shift-click offhand swap
✔ Shield fallback

Stay ready, always.
 By Yashh Penchi
